name: Cisco ISE
description: This app implements investigative and containment actions on a Cisco ISE device

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: List the endpoints configured on the system

parameters.name: mac_address
parameters.description: Mac Address to filter on (6 bytes, colon separated)

actions.name: Get Device Info
actions.description: Get information about a specific endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: ISE Endpoint ID for device

actions.name: Update Device Info
actions.description: Update information or attributes for a specific endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: ISE Endpoint ID for device

parameters.name: ph_0
parameters.description: Placeholder

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: Attribute to update for the Endpoint

parameters.name: attribute_value
parameters.description: Value to put in the attribute for the Endpoint

parameters.name: custom_attribute
parameters.description: Custom attribute to update for the Endpoint

parameters.name: custom_attribute_value
parameters.description: Value to put in the custom attribute for the Endpoint

actions.name: List Sessions
actions.description: List the sessions currently available on the Monitoring node

parameters.name: macaddress
parameters.description: MAC address of device to terminate sessions of

actions.name: List Resources
actions.description: Lists all the resources configured on the system of a particular resource

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource type of the resources to fetch

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Total number of observables to return

actions.name: Get Resources
actions.description: Get the information about resource if resource_id is provided. Fetch the list of resources match with the key-value filter

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource type of the resource to fetch

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: Resource ID

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource type of the resource to be deleted

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: Resource ID

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource type of the resource to be created

parameters.name: resource_json
parameters.description: JSON which contains all values needed to create a resource

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource type of the resource to be created

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: ID of resource

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key of resource which needs to be updated

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: New value of key

actions.name: Apply Policy
actions.description: Apply policy on selected Ip address or MAC address

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Policy Name

parameters.name: ip_mac_address
parameters.description: MAC or IP Address of the device

actions.name: Clear Policy
actions.description: Clear policy on selected Ip address or MAC address

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Policy Name

parameters.name: ip_mac_address
parameters.description: MAC or IP Address of the device

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Lists all the ANC policies available

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Policy Name

parameters.name: action_type
parameters.description: Policy action type

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Policy Name

actions.name: List Anc Endpoints
actions.description: List the endpoints with anc configured on the system

actions.name: Anc Device Info
actions.description: Get information about a specific endpoint with assigned anc policy

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: ISE Endpoint ID for device
